---
date: "2026-06-08T12:00:00+00:00"
draft: false
image: img/portfolio/banc/12_data_and_code.png
showonlyimage: false
title: code - bancr
weight: 6
bibliography: asb.bib
---

[![Zenodo](https://img.shields.io/badge/Zenodo-10.5281%2Fzenodo.20350647-1f4d2b)](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20350647)

<!--more-->

The primary **R** client for the BANC connectome: query per-neuron metadata, connectivity, influence and NBLAST cross-dataset matches, read neuron meshes, and transform neurons into shared template spaces. Part of the [natverse](https://natverse.org).

**Source:** [natverse/bancr](https://github.com/natverse/bancr).  **Archive:** Zenodo, [10.5281/zenodo.20350647](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20350647).

**Cite as:** Bates et al., 2026: bancr (DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.20350647).
